Share Print PDF Provides information about scams, fraud, and other threats to consumers. Includes a consumer hotline and online portal for reporting consumer complaints, scams, and fraud. The Scam Alert Network provides email alerts and social media posts about current scams. 1162 Court Street NE Salem, OR 97301 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 8:30am-4:30pm Email (887) 887-9392 Get Directions Visit Website More Details UNITED STATES POSTAL SERVICE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Local post offices are responsible for the collection, processing, and delivery of letters, parcels, and other materials. Provides retail sales of postage stamps, mailing materials, and other mail-related items. Most post offices have locked boxes that customers can rent for receiving mail rather than general mail service. Investigates consumer criminal complaints about mail theft, fraud, narcotics, and other crimes. Assists with mail delivery complaints.
